papers.title: Testing Calibration in Nearly-Linear Time
intro_excerpts: Probabilistic predictions are at the heart of modern data science.
The question of measuring the calibration of a distribution is subtle.
We initiate the algorithmic study of the calibration testing problem.
To our knowledge, we are the first to formalize the calibration testing problem.
Our first algorithmic contribution is a nearly-linear time algorithm.

structure_mapping.evidence: 从预测系统在高风险决策中的作用切入
定义二分类预测-结果联合分布与校准概念
指出 ECE 与分箱方案的可测性问题
给出 calibration testing 定义
给出 O(n log^2 n) 与信息论可行阈值

papers.title: Quantum algorithm for large-scale market equilibrium computation

structure_mapping.evidence: 本轮未成功抓取 Introduction 原文，待重试

papers.title: Grounding Multimodal Large Language Models in Actions
intro_excerpts: A key and open challenge ... is the gap between natural language and action space.
There has not been a systematic study of these designs.
We empirically identify important principles for designing ASAs.
For continuous action spaces, learned tokenization ... yields the best performance.
For discrete actions, semantic alignment ... yields the best strategy.

structure_mapping.evidence: 先讲 MLLM 在多任务上的快速进展
指出输出空间与动作空间不匹配
强调缺少跨环境、跨策略系统研究
分连续/离散动作给出不同最优策略
用多环境数字结果收束贡献

papers.title: FlowLLM: Flow Matching for Material Generation with Large Language Models as Base Distributions
intro_excerpts: Material discovery holds transformative potential across numerous industries.
The vastness of chemical space has hindered experimental synthesis.
To harness the strengths of both paradigms, we introduce FlowLLM.
This synergistic approach bridges discrete and continuous modeling.
Our contributions are as follows.

structure_mapping.evidence: 先给跨行业应用价值
LLM擅长离散，去噪模型擅长连续
提出 LLM + RFM 协同架构
给性能提升并解释为何有效
以条目形式收束
本轮未成功抓取 Introduction 原文，待重试

papers.title: 3D Focusing-and-Matching Network for Multi-Instance Point Cloud Registration
intro_excerpts: Multi-instance registration emerges as a critical need in robotic bin picking.
Existing pipelines can be roughly divided into two-stage and one-stage.
It is still difficult to accurately cluster correspondences into individual instances.
We first focus on object centers, then learn instance-level matching.
The core idea is to decompose one-to-many into multiple one-to-one registrations.

structure_mapping.evidence: 从多实例+遮挡+杂乱导致难度升级切入
先比较两阶段/一阶段
指出对应关系与聚类都不稳
先中心后配准，降低问题耦合
强调范式创新与可迁移性

papers.title: Maximizing utility in multi-agent environments by anticipating the behavior of other learners
intro_excerpts: With increased use of learning algorithms, multi-agent deployment is inevitable.
It is natural to ask: what is the optimal strategy in repeated interactions?
This raises the following meta question.
Can such an optimal strategy be computed efficiently?
We study a learner and an optimizer in repeated games.

structure_mapping.evidence: 拍卖、定价等多主体场景
提出最优应对策略的元问题
把策略优劣转化为效率问题
learner-optimizer 二角色建模
正负结果并置形成张力

papers.title: Dense Associative Memory Through the Lens of Random Features
intro_excerpts: Hopfield network of associative memory is an elegant mathematical model.
In this formulation, adding new patterns requires additional weights.
Alternatively, one could rewrite the above energy in a different form.
The distributed representation approximates both energy and dynamics.
Adding new memories does not change the size of the memory tensor.

structure_mapping.evidence: 先复述 Hopfield 的记忆表征
新增记忆会导致参数增长
引入分布式/随机特征视角
固定参数下近似原动力学
扩容能力与计算性质兼得

papers.title: Unleashing Region Understanding in Intermediate Layers for MLLM-based Referring Expression Generation
intro_excerpts: A good expression should be distinguishable enough to identify the unique target.
MLLMs themselves suffer from object hallucination.
There exists a trade-off between detailedness and correctness.
To address this issue, we propose a training-free framework.
Extensive experiments ... improve both semantic and hallucination metrics.

structure_mapping.evidence: 先定义 REG 的目标与判据
指出 MLLM 幻觉与先验依赖
细节充分性 vs 正确性
unleash-then-eliminate 双阶段
双维指标均提升

papers.title: Multiview Scene Graph
intro_excerpts: Can we equip AI models with similar spatial intelligence?
We propose the task of building a Multiview Scene Graph (MSG).
MSG directly evaluates graph quality rather than downstream navigation only.
To facilitate research, we curated a dataset and designed evaluation metrics.
In summary, our contributions are two-fold.

structure_mapping.evidence: 从人类认知地图类比切入
给定无位姿图像，构建 place+object 图
直接评估图质量而非下游任务
数据集+指标+AoMSG 基线
两点贡献清晰收束
